title: Pharaoh workflows tailoring file
$comment: JSON Schema cannot enforce cross-array referential integrity (transition from/to values must be members of lifecycle_states). That check is performed by pharaoh-tailor-review cross-file rule C3.

lifecycle_states.description: Ordered list of valid lifecycle state names for this project.

transitions.description: Allowed state transitions. Each entry declares the source state, destination state, and required approvals.

from.description: Source lifecycle state. Must be a member of lifecycle_states (enforced by pharaoh-tailor-review C3).

to.description: Target lifecycle state. Must be a member of lifecycle_states (enforced by pharaoh-tailor-review C3).

requires.description: List of approval or gate names that must be satisfied before this transition is allowed.
